patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female. Visit diagnoses documented 06/30/2023 include: Mixed dyslipidemia - Primary; Essential hypertension, benign; Postoperative anemia; Leg pain; Unspecified anemia. Laboratory studies dated 07/03/2023 show Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL, Iron 41 (L) ug/dL, Iron Saturation 15 (L) %, eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2, Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL, VLDL Cholesterol Cal 32 (H) mg/dL, Chloride 108 (H) mmol/L, and Anion Gap 5.0 (L) mmol/L. Primary care is with Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP - General Family Medicine). Several upcoming visits are scheduled in 2024 with primary care, rheumatology, gastroenterology, and cardiology as listed in the plan.
